---
title: "Research Overview"
subtitle: "Computational approaches to decode complex biological systems using public omics data"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     WHY PUBLIC DATA — rationale strip
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ro-why-strip">
<div class="ro-why-inner">
<div class="ro-why-item">
<span class="ro-why-icon">🔬</span>
<div>
<strong>Reproducibility</strong>
<p>All datasets are publicly archived — every analysis can be independently verified and extended.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-why-item">
<span class="ro-why-icon">📊</span>
<div>
<strong>Scale</strong>
<p>Thousands of samples across tissues, diseases, and cohorts — far beyond single-lab capacity.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-why-item">
<span class="ro-why-icon">💡</span>
<div>
<strong>Open Science</strong>
<p>FAIR data principles enable cross-study meta-analyses and collaborative discovery.</p>
</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-why-item">
<span class="ro-why-icon">⚙️</span>
<div>
<strong>Generalisability</strong>
<p>Multi-cohort validation increases confidence that findings are not dataset-specific artefacts.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     WORKFLOW 1 — Bulk RNA-Seq Meta-Analysis
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ro-workflow-section">

<div class="ro-wf-header">
<div class="ro-wf-badge">Workflow 01</div>
<h2 class="ro-wf-title">Bulk RNA-Seq Meta-Analysis</h2>
<p class="ro-wf-subtitle">Large-scale transcriptomic discovery using harmonised public datasets from NCBI GEO & SRA</p>
</div>

<div class="ro-why-box">
<span class="ro-why-label">Why public bulk RNA-seq data?</span>
Public repositories (GEO, SRA, ArrayExpress) host <strong>100,000+ RNA-seq samples</strong> across diseases, tissues, and treatment conditions. Meta-analysing these datasets reveals robust, cross-cohort differential expression signals that no single study can provide — dramatically increasing statistical power and biological generalisability.
</div>

<div class="ro-steps">
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">1</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🗄️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Data Discovery</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">GEO · SRA · ArrayExpress</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">2</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🧹</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Quality Control</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">FastQC · MultiQC · Trimmomatic</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">3</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">📐</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Quantification</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">STAR · Salmon · featureCounts</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">4</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">⚖️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Normalisation</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">DESeq2 · edgeR · limma-voom</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">5</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">📊</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Meta-Analysis</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">MetaVolcanoR · RankProd</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step ro-step-output">
<div class="ro-step-num">6</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🎯</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Biomarker Panel</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">DEGs · Pathway Enrichment</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ro-tags-row">
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">GEO</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">SRA</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">ArrayExpress</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">DESeq2</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">edgeR</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">limma</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">MetaVolcanoR</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">GSEA</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-lang">R</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-lang">Python</span>
</div>

</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     WORKFLOW 2 — Single-Cell Harmonised Framework
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ro-workflow-section">

<div class="ro-wf-header">
<div class="ro-wf-badge ro-wf-badge-sc">Workflow 02</div>
<h2 class="ro-wf-title">Single-Cell Harmonised Framework</h2>
<p class="ro-wf-subtitle">Cross-cohort single-cell atlas construction and comparative cell-state analysis</p>
</div>

<div class="ro-why-box ro-why-box-sc">
<span class="ro-why-label">Why public scRNA-seq data?</span>
Public single-cell datasets from <strong>CellxGene, GEO, and the Human Cell Atlas</strong> allow cross-cohort atlas construction at a scale impossible for a single lab. Integrating multiple studies removes batch-specific noise, reveals conserved cell states across diseases, and enables discovery of rare populations with unprecedented statistical confidence.
</div>

<div class="ro-steps">
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">1</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🗄️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Data Retrieval</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">CellxGene · GEO · HCA</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">2</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🧹</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">QC & Filtering</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">Scrublet · DoubletFinder</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">3</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🔗</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Batch Integration</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">Harmony · scVI · BBKNN</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">4</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🗺️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Clustering & UMAP</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">Leiden · UMAP · t-SNE</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">5</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🏷️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Cell Annotation</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">CellTypist · ScType · Manual</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step ro-step-output">
<div class="ro-step-num">6</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🎯</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Comparative Analysis</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">DEGs · Trajectory · Regulons</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ro-tags-row">
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">CellxGene</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">HCA</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">GEO</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">Seurat</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">Scanpy</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">Harmony</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">scVI</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">PYSCENIC</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-lang">Python</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-lang">R</span>
</div>

</div>


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     WORKFLOW 3 — ML/DL in Genomics
═══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ro-workflow-section">

<div class="ro-wf-header">
<div class="ro-wf-badge ro-wf-badge-ml">Workflow 03</div>
<h2 class="ro-wf-title">ML / DL in Genomics</h2>
<p class="ro-wf-subtitle">Machine and deep learning for biomarker discovery, disease classification, and precision medicine</p>
</div>

<div class="ro-why-box ro-why-box-ml">
<span class="ro-why-label">Why ML/DL on public omics data?</span>
High-dimensional omics data (10,000+ features per sample) exceeds the capacity of classical statistics. Machine learning extracts <strong>non-linear, multi-feature patterns</strong> that predict disease status, prognosis, and drug response. Public datasets provide the large, diverse sample sizes required to train generalisable models — with SHAP enabling biological interpretability.
</div>

<div class="ro-steps">
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">1</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🗄️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Multi-omics Input</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">TCGA · GTEx · GEO</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">2</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">⚙️</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Feature Engineering</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">Selection · Scaling · PCA</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">3</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🤖</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Model Training</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">XGBoost · RF · DNN · CNN</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">4</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">✅</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Validation</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">Cross-validation · Hold-out</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step">
<div class="ro-step-num">5</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🔍</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Interpretability</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">SHAP · LIME · Attention</div>
</div>
<div class="ro-arrow">→</div>
<div class="ro-step ro-step-output">
<div class="ro-step-num">6</div>
<div class="ro-step-icon">🎯</div>
<div class="ro-step-label">Biomarker Panel</div>
<div class="ro-step-sub">Diagnosis · Prognosis · Targets</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="ro-tags-row">
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">TCGA</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">GTEx</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-db">GEO</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">scikit-learn</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">XGBoost</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">PyTorch</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-tool">SHAP</span>
<span class="ro-tag ro-tag-lang">Python</span>
</div>

</div>
```
